节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: ErrorCode
CompressLevel
Indicates the no compression mode.
Indicates the best speed mode.
Indicates the best compression mode.
Indicates the default compression mode.
CompressStrategy
Indicates the default strategy.
Indicates the filtered strategy.
Indicates the huffman-only strategy.
Indicates the RLE strategy.
Indicates the fixed strategy.
ParallelStrategy
Indicates the sequential strategy, compress and decompress sequentially.
Indicates the parallel decompression strategy.
PathSeparatorStrategy
Default strategy that no processing of path separators.
Strategy to that replaces backslash '\' with slash '/' during file decompression. This ensures path consistency across platforms (e.g., converting Windows-style paths to Unix-style paths).
MemLevel
Uses the least amount of memory.
Uses the maximum amount of memory.
Uses the default amount of memory.
CompressFlushMode
Default value, indicating normal operation.
Generate partial refresh points in compressed streams.
Force output of all compressed data while maintaining the compressed stream state.
the compression state is reset.
The compression or decompression process ends.
Allow for finer grained control.
There are special purposes in implementation.
Return codes for the compression/decompression functions.
Indicates success.
Indicates that the entire data has been processed.
Indicates preset dictionary is required to continue decompression.
Indicates system error.
Indicates compression or decompression stream error, which may be caused by an initialization error in the zlib stream structure or a modified structure.
Indicates the input data is incorrect. For example, the data does not conform to the zlib compression format, the compressed data is corrupted, or the data is not compressed.
Indicates memory allocation failed.
Indicates the input buffer is incorrect, and the output buffer is too small to accommodate the compressed or decompressed data.
The deflate compression method (the only one supported in this version).
Compression method.
Define the reference point for offset.
Seek from beginning of file.
Seek from current position.
Defines compress or decompress options.
Indicates the compress level.
Indicates the memory level.
Indicates the compress strategy.
Indicates the parallel strategy.
Indicates the path separator strategy.
Process all the information required for compression and decompression.
Next input byte.
Number of bytes available at nextIn.
Total number of input bytes read so far.
Next output byte will go here.
Remaining free space at nextOut.
Total number of bytes output so far.
Best guess about the data type.
Adler-32 or CRC-32 value of the uncompressed data.
Gzip header information passed to and from zlib routines.
True if compressed data believed to be text.
Operating system.
Modification time.
Extra flags.
Extra field.
Extra field length.
Zero-terminated file name.
Zero-terminated comment.
True if there was or will be a header crc
True when done reading gzip header.
Compression and decompression return value information.
ReturnStatus the specific meaning is defined as enum.
Total sizeof the destination buffer.
InflateGetDictionary and deflateGetDictionary return value information.
ReturnStatus the specific meaning is defined as enum.
Return dictionary length.
Uncompress2 return value information.
ReturnStatus the specific meaning is defined as enum.
Total sizeof the destination buffer.
Total sizeof the sourceLen.
DeflatePending return value information.
ReturnStatus the specific meaning is defined as enum.
The number of bytes of output that have been generated.
The number of bits of output that have been generated.
GzError return value information.
Return Zlib status ReturnStatus the specific meaning is defined as enum.
The status message for the last status which occurred on file.

A callback function for reading input data provided by a user. When the decompression process requires more input data, zlib will call this function. This function should read data from the data source to the buffer. The specific type and content depend on the actual application scenario, which can include configuration data, file handles, etc.
注释信息: @param { object } inDesc - A universal user-defined data object.
@returns { ArrayBuffer } Return the buffer successfully read by the data source through the input descriptor.
节点.return_description: Return the buffer successfully read by the data source through the input descriptor.

节点.功能描述: The output data provided by the user is written into the callback function. Whenever decompressed data is ready for output, zlib calls this function to write the data from the buffer to the target location.
注释信息: @param { object } outDesc - Object passed to output function. Object dependency requirement implementation.
@param { ArrayBuffer } buf - Used to store data to be written.
@param { number } length - Write the length of the output buffer.
@returns { number } Return the number of bytes output.
节点.return_description: Return the number of bytes output.

节点.功能描述: Return flags indicating compile-time options. Type sizes, two bits each, 00 = 16 bits, 01 = 32, 10 = 64, 11 = other: 1.0: size of uInt. 3.2: size of uLong. 5.4: size of voidpf (pointer). 7.6: size of z_off_t. Compiler, assembler, and debug options: 8: ZLIB_DEBUG. 9: ASMV or ASMINF -- use ASM code. 10: ZLIB_WINAPI -- exported functions use the WINAPI calling convention. 11: 0 (reserved). One-time table building (smaller code, but not thread-safe if true): 12: BUILDFIXED -- build static block decoding tables when needed. 13: DYNAMIC_CRC_TABLE -- build CRC calculation tables when needed. 14,15: 0 (reserved). Library content (indicates missing functionality): 16: NO_GZCOMPRESS -- gz* functions cannot compress (to avoid linking deflate code when not needed). 17: NO_GZIP -- deflate can't write gzip streams, and inflate can't detect and decode gzip streams (to avoid linking crc code). 18-19: 0 (reserved). Operation variations (changes in library functionality): 20: PKZIP_BUG_WORKAROUND -- slightly more permissive inflate. 21: FASTEST -- deflate algorithm with only one, lowest compression level. 22,23: 0 (reserved). The sprintf variant used by gzprintf (zero is best): 24: 0 = vs*, 1 = s* -- 1 means limited to 20 arguments after the format. 25: 0 = *nprintf, 1 = *printf -- 1 means gzprintf() not secure. 26: 0 = returns value, 1 = void -- 1 means inferred string length returned. Remainder: 27-31: 0 (reserved).
注释信息: @returns { Promise<number> } Return flags indicating compile-time options.
节点.return_description: Return flags indicating compile-time options.

节点.功能描述: Initializes the internal stream state for decompression. It should be in the range 8..15 for this version of the library. The default value is 15 if inflateInit is used instead. windowBits must be greater than or equal to the windowBits value provided to deflateInit2() while compressing, or it must be equal to 15 if deflateInit2() was not used. If a compressed stream with a larger window size is given as input, inflate() will return with the error code Z_DATA_ERROR instead of trying to allocate a larger window. WindowBits can also be zero to request that inflate use the window size in the zlib header of the compressed stream. WindowBits can also be -8..-15 for raw inflate. In this case, -windowBits determines the window size. inflate() will then process raw deflate data, not looking for a zlib or gzip header, not generating a check value, and not looking for any check values for comparison at the end of the stream. This is for use with other formats that use the deflate compressed data format such as zip. Those formats provide their own check values. If a custom format is developed using the raw deflate format for compressed data, it is recommended that a check value such as an Adler-32 or a CRC-32 be applied to the uncompressed data as is done in the zlib, gzip, and zip formats. For most applications, the zlib format should be used as is. Note that comments above on the use in deflateInit2() applies to the magnitude of windowBits.WindowBits can also be greater than 15 for optional gzip decoding. Add 32 to windowBits to enable zlib and gzip decoding with automatic header detection, or add 16 to decode only the gzip format. If a gzip stream is being decoded, strm->adler is a CRC-32 instead of an Adler-32. Unlike the gunzip utility and gzread(), inflate() will *not* automatically decode concatenated gzip members. Inflate() will return Z_STREAM_END at the end of the gzip member. The state would need to be reset to continue decoding a subsequent gzip member. This *must* be done if there is more data after a gzip member, in order for the decompression to be compliant with the gzip standard. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { ZStream } strm - Object to structure z_stream.
@param { number } windowBits - Is the base two logarithm of the maximum window size.
@returns { Promise<ReturnStatus> } Return ReturnStatus the specific meaning is defined as enum.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - The parameter check failed. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;
@throws { BusinessError } 17800004 - Compression or decompression stream error, which may be caused by an initialization error in the zlib stream structure or a modified structure.

parameters.说明: Is the base two logarithm of the maximum window size.
